case_title: CHARLES BOYAKINS et al VS. ROBERT NIKCHEMNY et al

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFFS' RESPONSE TO OSC RE: FAILURE TO SERVE FILED
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAR-12-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-22-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). OSC TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY JAMES M. ROGERS. THE APR-12-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
